title: polypodium lecanopteris
intro: Polypodium lecanopteris, also known as the Leptosporangiate Polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodium lecanopteris include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Polypodium lecanopteris is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
